MOTION NOTICE OF HEARING RE; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
